_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

validations.logic: All /staff/dashboard routes require authenticated staff user.
Dashboard cannot load until role view is resolved.
Non-admin roles must be scoped by assigned schools/regions/queues.
Browser-supplied school_id filters are validated against staff assignment scope.
Each widget requires permission to its source module or safe summary permission.
Dashboard drilldown links require permission in target module.
Critical alert tile must not expose raw OMR, answer keys, payment payloads, private file URLs or audit snapshots.
Dashboard cache must include scope hash and expire quickly.
Staff can update only their own dashboard preferences unless admin.
Dismissing a dashboard alert never resolves underlying issue.
